ORDER APPROVING JUDGMENT
CONSENT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION AS TO DEFENDANT BARNETT INC

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT. MOVING PARTY APPEARED. NO APPEARANCES IN OPPOSITION. THEREFORE, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED -- PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. A JAMES ROBERTSON, II REPORTER: LEE BATARA, CSR 3759
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-16-2002 VACATED, CONSENT JUDGMENT APPROVED AND FILED.
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON AUG-15-2002 IN DEPT. 306 -

David H. Williams, Esq. 510/647-1900 for Plaintiff and moving party
No appearance by Andrew B. Kaplan, Esq., defense counsel. He was not present on Court Call. Also, the Clerk called his business phone number 619/232-1991 and this number has a block on collect calls.

Therefore, tentative ruling adopted -- Plaintiff Mateel Environmental Justice Foundation's Motion to Approve Proposition 65 Settlement and for entry of Consent Judgment is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. (AJR) Lee Batara, CSR 3759
